# Paint To Hide Wiki (https://painttohide.com)

Unofficial fan wiki for Paint To Hide!, the Roblox camouflage hide-and-seek game by Chabungus X Cache Flow (place 105281019603659, released May 19, 2026).
Not affiliated with Roblox or the developer. Honest codes tracking: no verified codes as of July 2026; codes ranking for this search usually belong to Paint and Hide, a different game.

## Pages

- [Paint To Hide Wiki — Roblox Codes, Hider & Seeker Guides](https://painttohide.com/): Fan wiki for Paint To Hide! on Roblox: honest codes status, camouflage tips, seeker routes, live stats. Check the real game before you redeem anything.
- [Paint To Hide Codes — Real Status, No Copied Lists (2026)](https://painttohide.com/codes/): No verified Paint To Hide codes yet — checked July 4, 2026. That SUMMER! code belongs to a different Roblox game. See how we verify and what to watch.
- [How to Play Paint To Hide — Roblox Rules & Controls](https://painttohide.com/how-to-play/): Learn Paint To Hide in one round: hider painting basics, seeker sweeps, the Shift + P free cam, and how caught hiders switch teams. Then open Roblox and try it.
- [Paint To Hide Hiding Spots & Camouflage Tips (Roblox)](https://painttohide.com/hiding-spots/): Where to hide in Paint To Hide and how to color-match so seekers walk past: surface choice, outline control, the Shift + P self-check, and the ban line.
- [Paint To Hide Seeker Guide — Find Every Hider (Roblox)](https://painttohide.com/seeker-guide/): Seeker tips for Paint To Hide: sweep routes instead of circles, spotting bad paint jobs, and using catch-to-convert to snowball before the timer ends.
- [Paint To Hide vs Paint Or Seek vs Paint and Hide (Roblox)](https://painttohide.com/vs-paint-or-seek/): Six Roblox paint hide and seek games share nearly one name. Compare creators, release dates, and codes status — and land in the game you actually meant.
